allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python, py, ruff, mypy, pytest -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($cmds = @\("uv", "uvx", "python", "py", "ruff", "mypy", "pytest"\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { try { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction Stop; "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } catch { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })
PowerShell(python -m uv run ruff format consistency_checker/audit/report.py consistency_checker/pipeline.py 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m uv run pytest -m "not slow and not live" -x --tb=short 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m uv run pytest -m "not slow and not live" --tb=short --ignore=tests/test_corpus.py 2>&1)
Bash(git commit -m 'Local F4 parallel work for comparison vs origin'\\''s F4 \(PR #31\) *)
PowerShell(python -m uv run ruff format tests/test_triangle.py 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m uv run pytest tests/test_triangle.py tests/test_multi_party_finding.py -v --tb=short 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m uv run pytest -m "not slow and not live" --tb=line 2>&1)
